app_release_notes: v1.0.4 - The big Measure-a-Ladder update (several groups per target photo, ruler-style Set scale, seating jam support, one active load with Past Loads, auto-named loads), now with a polish pass so input fields no longer cut off long values (rifle/optic names, ladder charges) and hints read cleaner.
